text_instruction: In the inner rectangle of the 'Before' diagram, remove the small labels 'x' and 'y', and change the vertical dashed line separating the columns into a solid line.
Change the color of the two small vertical arrows to red to emphasize the natural transformation, and rename the objects A and B to X and Y respectively.

Add a main title 'Linked List Comparison' at the top center of the diagram. In the first list of the top group, change the data value '2' to '7'. Finally, remove the empty, unattached rectangular box located at the very end of the bottom-most list.

Add a title 'Map Function Trace' at the top of the figure. Insert a red rectangle around the value '514229' at the bottom left to highlight the calculation result. Finally, update the text of the last node to read '[y, y, y, y]' for clearer list formatting.

Expand the chart by adding a new node labeled 'Box 3' to the right of 'Box 2' and drawing an arrow from 'Box 2' to this new node. Also, add the label 'Main Flow' above the central arrow connecting Box 1 and Box 2.
Update the diagram to English by changing 'Evaporatore' to 'Evaporator', 'Condensatore' to 'Condenser', and 'Turbina' to 'Turbine'.

Simplify the graph structure by merging the bottom-left and bottom-right nodes into a single central node. Additionally, fill all the node circles with a light blue color and remove the caption 'Figure 1: Graph g1' at the bottom.
Please simplify the layout by moving the label 'C' to the top-left corner. Also, remove all the $\frac{1}{5}$ labels and change the dashed grid lines to a neutral gray.

Invert the logical flow of the left diagram (a) by reversing all its arrows to point upwards instead of downwards, remove the curly brace annotations next to it, and change the text color of all labels in that section to red.

Fill the two wide, multi-cell nodes with a light gray color to distinguish them. Remove the standalone square node located at the very top of the diagram. Finally, add the text label "Root" directly above the central wide node.
Delete the edge labels 'else' and 'it', and update the dashed arrow pointing to '(path1)' to be a solid arrow.
Invert the entire flow of the diagram by reversing the direction of the arrow from B to C, the arrow from D to C, and the arrow from C to A.
Delete the 'git fetch' and 'git merge' arrows, and rename 'git push' to 'git upload'.
Delete the curved double-headed arrow connecting A and B, and change the geometry of both nodes A and B to rectangles.
Remove the 'PV' label, the vertical line underneath it, and the text 'pazirāi' from the first diagram.
Delete the red shaded angle sector, remove the '36.87°' text label associated with it, and also remove the black dot at point E.

I want to clean up the layout: separate the High and Low Pass filters vertically so they aren't so close, move the 'Band Pass Filter' title to the bottom-right corner of its box, and update the 'roundrobin(1,1)' node text to 'Sequencer'.
Remove the 'help!' text label, change the content of the red root node to 'R', and add a new child node labeled '6' to the node containing '5'.
Relocate the caption to the top of the chart, move the green highlight rectangle to cover the bottom four rows of the grid, and change the rectangle's outline to a dashed line.
Add a text label 'Sender' to the left of the 'Host 1' title, add a 'Receiver' label to the right of the 'Host 2' title, and change the text color of the 'Mezzo fisico' label at the bottom to blue.
Change the fill color of the 'Subsystem' container to light gray. Additionally, remove the 'Option Mapping' block and add a new block labeled 'Cache' inside the subsystem area.

Restructure the flowchart logic so that the 'accept' branches continue the process flow instead of the 'reject' branches, then change the fill color of the terminal decision boxes to red and update their text content to 'Rejected'.
Change the background color of 'Node A' to yellow to highlight the start, color 'nodeB' in green to indicate the finish, and remove the ellipsis '...' text in the center.
Rename the 'Begin' node to 'Start' and the 'End' node to 'Finish', and remove the intermediary step 'A2'.
Refactor the diagram by grouping the conditional tokens (TLParen to TRParen) into a generic container labeled 'Guard', delete the 'TPlusPlus' box, and rename the variable 'z' to 'limit'.
Remove the yellow 'End' node from the graph. Then, change the label of the 'Start' node to 'Root' and update its fill color to purple.
Remove the 'F5' label at the top, add a title 'Genomic Data Pipeline' centered above the first row, and rename 'Mutant dataset' to 'Experimental Dataset'.
Delete the text label 'w(x1)2' and the text label 'w(x2)2', then update the fill color of the top pink node, f1(e), to match the blue color of the other nodes.

Expand the system by adding a new circular node labeled '5' to the right of node 4, create a self-loop on this new node labeled 'x_{5,5}', and draw a curved transition arrow from node 1 to node 5 labeled 'x_{1,5}'.
Correct the label in the bottom branch to 'C. Some text' for consistency, then add a new node labeled 'F. Final' to the right of node E and connect E to it with an arrow.
Remove the 'Testing Waveform' and 'Full Model' shapes from the diagram, and change the fill color of the 'Reduced Model' shape to light blue.
Delete the 'Monomorphism' node on the left, and remove the 'Overloading' and 'Coercion' nodes from the 'Ad hoc' branch.
Increase the horizontal spacing between the two central empty blocks to reduce clutter. Then, change the feedback loop arrow to a dashed line style and add the label 'PID' to the first empty block.

Remove the 'Subtract the Green Channel' block to simplify the flow, insert a new block labeled 'Calibration' immediately after 'Acquire Image', and fill the 'Sign Detection Using NN' node with a light orange color to emphasize it.
Remove the vertical links connecting Z1 to G1 and Z4 to G4, and set the fill color of the Z3 node to orange.

Please add a main title 'Neural Network Architecture' centered at the very top of the diagram. Also, remove the small 'error' text label located in the middle of the connections, and increase the line width of the single circle in the Output layer to make it stand out.
Restructure the diagram by shifting node S to be a dependent of node R instead of the root. Also, remove the node T from the left branch and rename the label 'M' to 'Angle'.
Streamline the diagram by removing the 'Reflux esophagitis' and 'Barret's esophagitis' blocks. Also, please update the 'GERD' block's fill color to a light orange.

Change the connecting lines from the F nodes to the summation circle to be dashed. Remove the textual label 'Data' near the output arrow tip, and add a new label 'Aggregation' positioned directly below the summation operator.

Change the text color of the number '7' to red in all grids to highlight its position. Remove the grid located at the bottom right of the diagram. Finally, add a label 'Start' directly above the topmost grid.
Create a new node labeled '6' positioned to the right of node 4. Connect node 4 to this new node with a directed line, and label this connection with the weight '9'.
Update the middle map by changing the fill color of the gray loop to orange. Additionally, add the label 'Map B' above the middle map, and remove the red highlight from the rightmost map.
Merge the 'W' and 'Z' nodes into a single node labeled 'WZ', change the text color of node 'I' to blue, and remove node 'g' from the graph.
Remove the square labeled '1' from the left group, delete the square labeled '6' from the right group, and remove the outer green border surrounding the entire diagram.
Delete the second syntactic tree from the left to remove redundancy, remove the caption 'Figure 1: Test caption' at the bottom, and change the German text 'geben' to 'give'.

Reorganize the bottom hierarchy so X3 acts as a destination node by reversing the direction of the arrows connecting it to X4 and X1. Remove the central green loop indicators. Finally, change the line style of all internal straight black arrows to be dashed.

First, rearrange the diagram by moving the payoff matrix to be positioned directly below the directed graph. Second, update the payoff value '0' in the bottom-right cell (for player B) to '1'. Finally, add a new directed arrow connecting node '2' back to node 'M'.
Please replace the placeholder 'Class 3' with 'Non-Abelian' and rename 'Class 5' to 'Cyclic'. Also, add a new entry for 'Simple' extending from 'Abelian Groups'.

Please add the title 'Restricted Boltzmann Machine' at the top of the diagram. Also, remove the weight label '$w_{nm}$' on the right side, and change the fill color of the bottom circles to white to match the top ones.
Increase the thickness of all connecting arrow lines. Also, replace the question mark in the green circle with the text 'Start', and remove the numbers 1 through 4 along the first branch.

Change the line style of the entire left vertical path (C0 to C4) to dashed, change the line style of the right vertical path (C0 to C4 via C8) to dotted, and add a text label 'Figure 1' below the diagram.

Reduce the vertical gap in the flowchart by moving the middle dashed container (holding the 'AnalysisTop package') upwards closer to the DxAOD layer. Additionally, change the fill color of the 'primary xAOD MC' node to gray to separate it from the data node, and remove the text label 'label A' from the leftmost arrow.

Transform the diagram into a closed-loop system by adding a feedback arrow from the 'Link' circle back to the input of the W2 queue. Additionally, rename the 'Link' label to 'Server' and change the color of all blue arrows to black.
Delete the backward arrow pointing from n to y, and remove the label 'u' associated with it. Finally, change the line style of all the remaining arrows to be dashed.
Reverse the direction of all edges in the diagram to invert the flow. Then, remove the self-loop currently on node 'a' and change the fill color of all nodes to light green.
Remove the thick dotted line representing the cut. Then, delete the edge connecting node 1 and node 4. Finally, update the fill color of node 4 to green.
Shift the 'Source' block upwards to increase the top margin, shift the 'Sink' block downwards to increase the bottom margin, and change the boundary line of the red oval to a dashed pattern.
Highlight the center of the geometry by filling the middle circle with red, change the surrounding thick structural lines to a dashed style, and add the text label 'Core' inside that central circle.

Please add 'Curved lines' under the 'Drawing arrows between nodes' category, insert 'Snap to grid' into the 'Positioning the nodes' list, and append 'Transparency' to the 'Defining node and arrow styles' section.

To emphasize the prefix of the array, fill the background of the cells containing 1, 2, 3, and 4 with a light yellow color. Additionally, remove the curved dependency arrows above the array, and change the text label in the last cell from 'n' to 'N'.
Swap the position of the 'Goal 1' column group with the 'Goal 2' column group. Move the 'time' label to the far right end of the arrow. Change the fill color of all 'Task' rectangles to light gray.
Update the visual theme by changing the text color of all nodes to white. To maintain contrast, switch the node fill color to dark blue, and set the font style to bold.
Rename the 'start' node to 'Init', change 'OrderPage' to 'Order_UI', and replace the 'invoiceservice' label with 'Invoice_Gen'.
Mirror the tree structure horizontally by swapping the left and right subtrees, change the geometry of all leaf nodes to squares, and set the connecting lines to be dashed.

Reorganize the tree structure by swapping the branch containing 'apple' and 'pear' with the branch containing 'walk' and 'run'. Additionally, change the shape of all leaf nodes to rectangles and color their text blue.
Remove node H and node I from the diagram, then change the fill color of node C to gray.

I need to adjust the diagram's spacing: please move the 'OC' node and its sub-nodes further to the right to avoid proximity to the 'wurde' line. Also, standardize the diagram by changing the red line to black and converting the circular 'S' node at the top into a rectangle.
Reconfigure the diagram's logic by reversing the direction of every arrow to show a feedback loop. To highlight this change, update the arrows' line style to dashed and change their color to red.
Change the shape of the circular node on the right to a square, rename the label under the segmented rectangle to 'Buffer', and remove the dotted vertical lines between the Omega symbols.

Please move the node labeled 'n+1' further to the right to increase the gap between it and node 'n'. Additionally, correct the label 'μ0' under the first red arrow to 'μ1', and change the color of all the green forward transition arrows to blue.

I need a cleaner version of this model. Please remove the curved self-loop arrows at the bottom of the error terms. Also, delete the path labels 'a' through 'e' on the connections from node 'g'. Finally, remove the number '1' labels on the vertical arrows pointing up from the error circles.
Delete the text label 'Traditional validation', remove the green circle at the end of that row, and get rid of the variable 'E' next to the k-fold diagram.
Center the 'Junction1' box horizontally beneath the group of four input nodes, change the box's fill color to light orange, and switch the connecting lines to a dashed pattern.
Move the 'Diálogo' box downwards and the 'Inclusión' box upwards so they are closer to the center. Finally, update the text in the central circle to read 'Social Legitimacy'.

Update the diagram for a test question: change the variable 'b' to the number '12', delete the dotted line originating from vertex B, and add a small square symbol to mark the right angle at the base of the dashed line.
Delete the 'A3' node and the red 'C1' node to clean up the tree, and rename the 'BB BB BB BB' node to 'Category B'.

Apply a light blue fill color to the root node. Then, highlight the middle child node in the second tier (containing 13 and 16) with an orange background. Finally, fill the bottom-right leaf node containing values 22, 23, and 24 with green.

Extend the diagram at the bottom: insert a new blue category label 'End' beneath 'QQ', place a new node labeled 'Termination' to its right, and draw an arrow connecting 'belong to QQ' to this new node.

Collapse the two separate 'Children' nodes under 'Father' into a single node labeled 'Offspring' that contains all the associated leaf nodes. Additionally, rename the main title 'Family' to 'Genealogy' and change the text color of the 'Mother' label to blue.
Delete the 'Last block 4' node, remove 'Last block 3', and change the text of 'The second block 1' to 'Primary Branch'.

Please add the label 'Scenario A' centered above the top-left matrix and the label 'Scenario B' centered above the top-right matrix to distinguish the game setups. Additionally, update the figure caption at the bottom by replacing the placeholder 'cap here' with 'Payoff matrices for the three experimental conditions'.
Add the title 'Dyadic Grid' at the top of the chart, change the fill pattern of the hatched squares to solid light gray, and remove the $2^{-j}$ scale indicator from the bottom left.

Reverse the diagram's flow to show a 'scaling down' process by swapping the positions of the single and multi-instance groups. Change the line type of all boxes to dashed, and add a title 'De-scaling Process' at the top.
Delete the 'advice' and 'pain' nodes, and remove the connection between 'alert' and 'track'.
Move the layer size labels (3, 64, 64, 1) to the top of their respective columns, delete the '50% dropout' annotation including the brace, and change the fill color of the output node to red.

Swap the vertical positions of 'Node One' and 'Node Two' within the 'First Time' section so that 'Node Two' appears on top. Change the text of the header 'First Time' to read 'Initial Phase'. Finally, add a small star shape to the left of this new header.
Remove the ellipsis symbol to the right of state 4' and the ellipsis symbol to the right of state 4. Then, change the label of the top-left state from 0' to S1.

Please make the header row text in the top table bold for emphasis. Additionally, replace the placeholder text 'Put here the 3rd table' with 'Distance Matrix', and add a rectangular frame around the equation $\hat{a}_{ij} = \text{dist}(x_i, p_j)$.

Remove the red cross-out line on the bottom edge connecting 'bar' to 'foo' and delete the label 'F(x)' located between 'foo' and 'bar'. Additionally, change the color of the red arrows between 'bow' and 'bar' to black.
Change the line style of the arrows originating from the input layer to dashed, change the arrows leading to the output layer to dotted, and add a rectangular border around the entire neural network.
Please delete the diagonal link between nodes B and C, remove the weight label '1' from the edge connecting A to C, and completely eliminate node F from the structure.

Translate the chart title from 'Announce Nachricht' to 'Announce Message', then extend the main sequence in the top row by appending a new block labeled 'CRC' to the right end and placing a '2 Byte' dimension label above it.

Simplify the graph structure by merging the x1 and x2 nodes into a single circular node labeled 'x1,2', keeping all original connections. Additionally, change the style of all currently dashed lines to dotted lines, and remove the caption 'Figure 1...' at the bottom.

Transform this representation into a two-set Venn diagram by eliminating the Blue circle and its intersections. Add a main title 'Interaction Analysis' above the shapes, and rename the 'yellow' label to 'Common'.
Delete the two placeholder nodes 'Child 1 of...' and 'Child 2 of...' at the bottom, and add a new node with the equation `\dot{y} = v_y` to the primary list of differential equations.

Organize the diagram structurally by enclosing all three array groups within a large dashed container rectangle, add the label "Memory Map" centered above this new container, and change the text color of all array elements to dark blue.
First, reposition the label P(2) to sit below the arrow connecting -1 to 0. Next, move the -2 circle upwards. Finally, delete the number '1' label located on the upper curved arrow.

Please adjust the diagram to improve clarity: shift the `_thread_start` node and all its connected children further to the right to create more separation between the two threads. Additionally, remove the `_start` node at the top, and change the text color of `__mt_SlaveFunction` to blue to highlight it.
Delete the central node labeled 'Center*' and the 'OR' text located between the bottom left branches, then change the fill color of the top 'Start' box to white.

Swap the positions of the 'Bla 1' and 'Bla 3' boxes in the top row, move the 'Center*' node vertically upwards to reduce the empty space below the top curly brace, and change the fill color of the 'Center*' node to light blue.
Change the probability text 'P = 0.6' to 'P = 0.65', add a new oval node labeled 'End' to the right of the diagram, and draw a directed arrow from the bottom-right orange node to this new 'End' node.

Expand the Decoder structure by inserting a new column labeled 'H5' to the right of 'H4'. Simultaneously, change the fill color of all active red nodes to purple and rename the 'Output' label to 'Predictions'.

Transform the encoder into a bidirectional component by adding backward arrows between the red hidden state blocks, change the fill color of these red blocks to purple, and add a title 'Seq2Seq Network' at the top of the diagram.
Please change the fill color of all circular nodes to light green, remove the '0.0001' text label from the very first upper branch, and add the text 'Start' at the leftmost vertex of the tree.
Change the color of the red arrow connecting node 3 to node 4 to black, update the text content of the top box to 'Start', and remove the bottom-most box labeled '6'.
Delete the PC box located inside the CPU and remove the ellipses (...) found between the Disc and Network nodes. Also, update the text in the central box from 'E/S Bridge' to 'I/O Bridge'.
Place the text '2023' in the center of the ring, remove the surrounding red circle, and change the yellow segment's fill color to green.
Change the fill color of the blue 'Output bits' rectangles to purple, remove the 'Node 1' through 'Node 4' labels at the bottom, and add a main title 'Trellis Diagram' at the top center.

Add a new circular state node labeled '1111' at the bottom center of the diagram. Connect the bottom-left node '0111' to this new node with a directed arrow labeled '$x_4$'. Finally, add a text label 'Target' just below the new '1111' node.

Standardize the diagram by translating the French labels 'Couche d'entrée', 'Couche cachée', 'Couche de sortie', and 'Prévision' into English as 'Input layer', 'Hidden layer', 'Output layer', and 'Prediction'. Additionally, remove the 'xxx yyy zzz' placeholder text groups on the left side and add a title 'Neural Network Architecture' at the top.
Fill all the square variable nodes with a light blue color, remove the diagonal arrow in the middle diagram (NAR Mechanism), and add a title 'Causal Models' at the top of the image.

Delete the 'Refinement' text label from the first arrow connecting to the Refined Specification ($R_1$), remove the 'Refinement' label from the final arrow pointing to the Executable Program, and remove the text '$(R_0)$' from the Abstract Specification box.

Simplify the network topology for an inference-only diagram. First, **remove the 'Back propagation' arrow and text**. Next, **restructure the Hidden layer by reducing it to three nodes**. Finally, **rename the 'Input layer' text to 'Source Data'**.
Alter the process flow to be finite. Redirect the 'No' arrow to a new 'STOP' node instead of looping back, and rename the 'INIZIALIZZA MICRO' block to 'START SYSTEM'.
Please remove the green line segment located on the right side of the image, delete the dashed box around node 'e', and remove the dashed rectangle that groups nodes 'h', 'i', and 'j'.

Add a title 'Asset Swap Structure' at the top center, place the text 'Cash Payment' under the arrow labeled '100' in the top diagram, and add a label 'Bond Default' next to the crossed-out bond in the bottom diagram.
Change the solid connecting arrows to dashed lines, rename the 'Voyelles' label to 'Vowels', and remove the red box highlighting the semi-consonants.
Delete the 'left' node from the structure. Next, change the text of the left-hand 'child' node to 'Leaf 1' and the right-hand 'child' node to 'Leaf 2'.
Add the caption 'Tree A' below the left structure and 'Tree B' below the right structure. In the right structure, change the label 'NP' to 'DP'.
Color the solid outer lines blue to highlight the shape's boundary, remove the internal dashed lines for a cleaner look, and add the text 'Figure 1' below the diagram.

Add a directed edge with a weight of 8 going from node 4 to node 3. Additionally, update the weight of the diagonal connection between node 6 and node 2 to 35, and change the outline color of node 1 to red.

I need to expand the process options in the diagram. Please add a box labeled 'D' to the stack in Stage 1, insert a new 'Option 3' box in Stage 3, and finally add a 'Maybe' box to the list in Stage 5.

Move the $P_{000}$ node further to the left to create separation, change the line type of the arrow connecting it to $P_{001}$ to be dashed, and delete the small incoming arrow pointing into $P_{000}$.
Remove the pink horizontal strip at the top of the figure, delete the '??' prefixes from the legend labels, and change the x-axis label 'Sample size' to 'N'.
Clean up the diagram by deleting the 'Legislative Courts' and 'Trial Court' boxes. Also, remove the connection arrow between the State Supreme Court and the main Supreme Court.

First, remove the red boundary line from the left diagram. Second, delete the semi-transparent pink fill from the right diagram. Finally, remove the node labeled '1' at the far left of the left diagram.
Remove the 'P Problems' oval, remove the 'NP Complete' oval, and change the title to 'Complex Systems'.
Move the 'Some text' label to the center of the diagram above the ruler and rename it to 'Process Flow'. Additionally, change the fill color of block B from orange to pink.

Modify the diagram by changing the shape of all the leaf nodes (A through F) from rectangles to circles. Additionally, update the text in the root node to read 'Overview' instead of 'Chapter 1', and remove the figure caption at the bottom.
Remove the outer curved dimension line, delete the label 'L' associated with it, and change the fill color of the sector to light green.

Move the 'Layer 1', 'Layer 2', and 'Layer 3' labels to the top of the diagram instead of the bottom. Additionally, remove the text labels 'Input #1', 'Input #2', and 'Input #19' to declutter the left side, and change the fill color of the blue hidden layer nodes to orange.

Reposition node 11 so it sits directly underneath node 4 to create a more compact vertical alignment. Additionally, remove the long curved edge connecting node 1 to node 6, and change the fill color of the starting node 0 to light gray to emphasize the entry point.

Please increase the vertical spacing between the five rows of nodes to reduce visual crowding, and move the right-hand task block section further to the right to lengthen the connecting arrows. Additionally, change the font color of the N-node labels to blue.
Align box B vertically under box A to straighten the left arrow, remove the red lines connecting the boxes, and change the yellow background color to light blue.
Delete the text label v1, remove the vertical arrow representing the y-axis, and clear the light blue shading.

Remove the labels 'Fold-1', 'Fold-2', 'Fold-3', and 'Fold-k' found underneath the blocks, delete the ellipsis '...' text located between the rows, and change the fill color of the black test blocks to dark blue.

Adjust the flowchart logic by rerouting the 'no' arrow from the 'In front of correct one?' decision to loop back to the 'Walk to the kitchen.' step. Additionally, correct the spelling in the final box to 'Grab a glass.' and change the fill color of the 'Filling a cup with water' node to light green.
First, remove the 'Input' box at the top. Next, correct the spelling in the first yellow box from 'Convolutoin layer' to 'Convolution layer'. Lastly, delete the 'Softmax layer' at the bottom.
Remove the 'Planta de corriente' and 'Planta de Tensão' captions located below the white plant blocks, and update the fill color of the 'Energy Management System' block to light blue.

Please add a heading 'Recursive Structure' at the top of the diagram and insert a small legend box on the right side. Additionally, change the text color of the diagonal numbers (1, 3, 6, 10) to blue.
Disconnect the wildlife module by deleting the dashed arrow leading to the farm box, then switch the node highlighting in the farm box by clearing the color from I_f and filling S_f with pink.

Please change the color of all the curved weight connection arrows to blue and the output arrow to red to distinguish the flow stages. Additionally, add a new text label 'Layer 1' located below the last input node.
Flip the entire diagram vertically to place the empty set at the top, change the fill color of all nodes to white, and remove the grey background shading.
Delete the label |V| and the vertical arrow on the right side. Then, change the line color of the large enclosing parentheses to red.

Move the gray box labeled 'B' further to the right to increase the gap between it and box 'A', change the font color of the central column headers (A, B, C) to red, and remove the row label 'N' located at the bottom left.
Add the text label 'Subject' next to the upper DP node, add the label 'Object' next to the DP node containing Mary, and finally, add a rectangular frame around the word 'likes' to highlight the verb.
Add a text label reading "Start" below the initial node S, change the font color of the S label to red, and add a text label reading "End" below the final node S_{k+1}.

Remove the gray fill color from the rectangular blocks labeled B1, B2, and Bk, delete the horizontal ellipses situated between these columns, and change the line type of the arrows originating from the top node S to dashed.

Modify the table styling by changing the background color of the pink upper-triangular cells to light green and the blue lower-triangular cells to light yellow. Additionally, rename the last column header '$x_6$' to 'Total' to reflect a new data aggregation.

I'd like to restyle this graph. First, change the geometry of all nodes from circles to hexagons. Second, apply a light blue fill to the nodes in the bottom row (U11, U21, U31). Lastly, remove the vertical line segments that connect the top row to the middle row.
Add a heading 'Sigmoid' centered above the first diagram and a heading 'Linear' centered above the second diagram. Additionally, add the equation text 'y = x' below the second diagram.

I'd like to reorganize the diagram for better clarity. First, swap the positions of nodes B1 and B2 in the right-hand box to untangle the crossing orange arrows. Second, move the overhead orange connecting line to the bottom of the diagram so it connects the bottoms of the two containers. Finally, change the fill color of all nodes in the right group (B1-B4) to yellow to distinguish them from the left group.
In the upper diagram, delete the nodes labeled $Y_1$ and $Y_2$, and change the text content of the $B_1$ node to 'Start'.
Align the node circles to the top of the container, shift the ellipsis dots to the bottom of the container, and add a label 'Sequence' above the box.
Delete the matrix on the far left and the matrix on the far right. Then, change the text color of the top-right matrix (containing all .1s) to blue.
Change the fill color of the highlighted diagonal cells to light blue, remove the entire duplicate grid section at the bottom, and add a title reading 'Cross-Validation Matrix' centered at the top.
Remove the small 'r' labels placed next to the orange nodes, delete the small 'b' labels located next to the black nodes, and change the text color of all orange labels to black.
Increase the line width of the two arrows originating from node D, and remove the long curved connection to node L.
Rename the label 'Hidden 1 – 128 Units' to 'Hidden Layer 1', change 'Now I think you can do the rest' to 'Hidden Layer 2', and update the text 'Anyway, happy pi day!' to 'Hidden Layer 3'.
Remove the 'Velocity' and 'Depth' output arrows along with their labels, and correct the spelling of 'Horisontal position' to 'Horizontal position'.
Remove the rectangular border and the 'E' label in the top-left corner, and change the line style of the circles to dashed.
Remove the circular nodes labeled $v_4$ and $v_5$. Then, rename the square node $f_2$ to 'End'.
Add a new circular node labeled 'X' positioned directly below node 1, and draw a directed arrow from node 1 to this new node 'X'. Additionally, change the text color of the label 'p_{1,1}' to red.
Restructure the ingestion layer by inserting a 'Firewall' node between the Machine and the Device, change the Machine label to 'Client', and apply a dashed line style to the new Firewall node.
Delete the 'before' label, remove the 'after' label, and remove the curved arrow connecting the two parts.
Change the fill color of the central circle to white, update the label $u_i$ to $p_u$, and update the label $u'_i$ to $q_i$.
Please delete the 'many' cloud bubble on the right, remove the curly brace beneath the grid, and take out the text 'Pft ...' at the bottom.

Standardize the color coding in the diagram. Change the fill color of the 'Feed-forward' block to light blue so it matches the 'Feedback' block. Additionally, update the 'Actuator' and 'Sensor' blocks to share the same peach background color as the 'Plant' block.
Remove the dashed boundary line indicating the 'Meta learner' section and delete the 'Meta learner' text label. Additionally, change the fill color of the 'Predicted Rating' block to light green.

Modify the background fill of the 'Active User' row to be light green instead of orange. Then, update the text 'Item-based' at the bottom to read 'Item-Item Similarity', and finally, remove the arrow on the right side associated with the 'User-based similarity measure'.

Swap the entire left and right graph groups to reverse the order of comparison. Change the central double arrow to a single arrow pointing right. Then, change the fill color of all nodes in the new right-hand group to light gray.
